description_long: This modern bungalow is situated within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a main building with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior finishes. The property includes a detached garage or outbuilding, a swimming pool with a deck, and several landscaped trees and shrubs distributed throughout the yard. The main structure has large windows, multiple entryways, and a spacious patio area, suggesting an open-plan interior. The lot is bordered by a low fence, and the driveway leads to the garage, providing access for vehicles. The outdoor space is well-organized, with clear zones for recreation, parking, and relaxation. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a black and white exterior, large windows, a detached garage, pool, and landscaped yard within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, pool, and most of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio, deck area, and the relationship between the main building and the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the side facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and scattered side windows
